name: zutil_zrdr_init
description: zUtil::ZRDR_Init lazily creates the mounted-archive list, initializes the search path, and clears the current archive pointer.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 20 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 43 bytes and the VC object body is 48 bytes with 5 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies lazy mounted-list creation, search-path initialization, and clearing of the current archive pointer.
